_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of Pathogenic Missense Mutations of NF1 Using Computational Approaches.

_contextSnippet: The native structure of the NF1 protein was retrieved from UniProt. Two hundred four Cys-associated (including Cys mutation to others or others mutation to Cys) missense mutations of NF1 were sourced from the UniProt, HGMD, and ClinVar databases
details: Successfully retrieved native structure of NF1 protein and provided 204 Cys-associated missense mutations for analysis
